VocabFlow iOS Splash Screen (Light Mode)
nodes.description: iOS universal splash screen for light mode. Warm off-white/cream background (#F0EBE3). Small centered square app icon with indigo-blue (#5B52EB) background and white bold 'V' lettermark. Minimalist, centered composition with generous whitespace.

nodes.label: VocabFlow iOS Splash Screen (Dark Mode)
nodes.description: iOS universal splash screen for dark mode. Very dark near-black background (#1A1410). Small centered square app icon with indigo-blue (#5B52EB) background and white bold 'V' lettermark. Same centered minimalist composition as light variant.

nodes.label: VocabFlow App Icon 192px (iOS App Bundle)
nodes.description: 192x192 pixel app icon inside the iOS Capacitor app bundle. Square with slightly rounded corners. Indigo-blue (#5B52EB) solid background. Large bold white geometric 'V' lettermark, wide chevron/checkmark form, no serifs. Used for PWA manifest and web app icon purposes within the mobile shell.

nodes.label: VocabFlow App Icon 512px (iOS App Bundle)
nodes.description: 512x512 pixel high-resolution app icon inside the iOS Capacitor app bundle. Square with slightly rounded corners. Indigo-blue (#5B52EB) solid background. Bold white geometric 'V' lettermark occupying most of the icon area. Clean flat design with no shadows, gradients, or additional decoration.

nodes.label: VocabFlow PWA App Icon 192px (Web Public)
nodes.description: 192x192 pixel PWA manifest icon in the web public directory. Identical design to the iOS bundle version: indigo-blue (#5B52EB) square background with bold white 'V' lettermark. Serves as the PWA home-screen icon for web/browser installation.

nodes.label: VocabFlow Brand Identity
nodes.description: Core brand identity for VocabFlow. Primary brand color is indigo-blue (#5B52EB). Lettermark is a bold geometric white 'V'. Design language is flat, minimal, and modern. Supports light mode (warm cream #F0EBE3 background) and dark mode (near-black #1A1410 background). Consistent across iOS splash screens, PWA icons, and mobile app bundle assets.

nodes.label: Primary Indigo-Blue Color (#5B52EB)
nodes.description: Primary brand accent color used across all VocabFlow icons and UI elements. Medium indigo-blue, approximately #5B52EB. Used as the icon background in all app icons and as the ox-accent design token in the Oxbridge design system.

nodes.label: Light Mode Splash Background (Warm Cream #F0EBE3)
nodes.description: Warm off-white cream color (#F0EBE3) used as the iOS splash screen background in light mode. Corresponds to the ox-bg design token in VocabFlow's Oxbridge design system.

nodes.label: Dark Mode Splash Background (Near-Black #1A1410)
nodes.description: Very dark near-black color (#1A1410) used as the iOS splash screen background in dark mode. Warm-toned dark background consistent with VocabFlow's Oxbridge design system dark mode.

nodes.label: VocabFlow 'V' Lettermark
nodes.description: Bold geometric white 'V' lettermark that is the central visual element of VocabFlow's brand. Wide chevron/checkmark form with no serifs. Rendered in white on the indigo-blue brand color background across all icon sizes and splash screens.

nodes.label: VocabFlow App Icon 512px (Public PWA)
nodes.description: 512x512px PWA/web app icon. Solid medium-blue/indigo square background with slightly rounded corners and a large bold white uppercase letter 'V' centered. The 'V' has clean geometric lines with a flat bottom notch. Background color is approximately #4F4DE0 (blue-indigo). Used as the primary web and PWA icon.

nodes.label: Android mdpi Adaptive Icon Foreground Layer
nodes.description: Android adaptive icon foreground layer at mdpi density (~48x48dp, actual px small). Contains the white bold letter 'V' on a blue-indigo square background. In adaptive icon architecture, this foreground layer is composited over the background layer; it is designed with safe zone padding so the 'V' remains visible regardless of mask shape applied by the launcher.

nodes.label: Android mdpi Standard Launcher Icon
nodes.description: Android standard (legacy) launcher icon at mdpi density. Shows the VocabFlow 'V' logo: blue-indigo square with white bold 'V'. This is the non-adaptive fallback used on older Android versions (<API 26) that do not support adaptive icons. Rendered as a flat square with the full icon composed in a single layer.

nodes.label: Android mdpi Round Launcher Icon
nodes.description: Android round launcher icon at mdpi density (API 25+ round icon variant). Identical visual design to the standard launcher icon — blue-indigo background with bold white 'V' — but pre-rendered or masked to a circular shape. Used by launchers that apply a circular mask to app icons (e.g., Pixel launcher on Android 7.1+).

nodes.label: Android mdpi Adaptive Icon Background Layer
nodes.description: Android adaptive icon background layer at mdpi density. Appears as a solid near-white / very light warm-grey color (approximately #F8F5F0 or similar off-white). This layer sits behind the foreground layer in the adaptive icon system. The neutral light background allows the launcher to apply any shape mask (circle, squircle, rounded square, etc.) while the colored foreground layer provides the primary visual identity.

nodes.label: Android Adaptive Icon System
nodes.description: Android adaptive icon architecture (API 26+): an icon is split into a foreground layer and a background layer. The system launcher applies a shape mask (circle, squircle, rounded square, teardrop, etc.) to both layers composited together. The foreground layer must keep key content within the 66dp safe zone. This system enables consistent icon shapes across launchers and supports parallax animation.

nodes.label: VocabFlow Brand Identity — V Logo
nodes.description: VocabFlow's visual brand identity uses a single bold white uppercase letter 'V' on a blue-indigo (#4F4DE0) background. The design is consistently applied across web PWA (512px icon), Android adaptive icon layers, legacy square launcher icon, and round launcher icon. The color aligns with the Oxbridge design system's accent color used throughout the app.

nodes.label: Android mdpi Screen Density
nodes.description: mdpi (medium dots per inch, ~160 dpi) is the baseline Android screen density. Launcher icons at mdpi are 48x48px (legacy) or 108x108px (adaptive). The mipmap-mdpi/ directory holds resources for this density bucket. Higher-density directories (hdpi, xhdpi, xxhdpi, xxxhdpi) serve progressively larger screens.

nodes.label: VocabFlow Android Launcher Icon — adaptive icon design
nodes.visual_description: Rounded-square icon with a solid purple/indigo background (#5B5BD6 approx). A large bold white letter V is centered, styled with a wide chevron/vector shape. Clean, minimal design. Used as the VocabFlow app launcher icon across all Android density buckets (ldpi through xxxhdpi), both standard and adaptive variants (ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher_round.png, ic_launcher_foreground.png).

nodes.label: Android Splash Screens — all density and orientation variants
nodes.visual_description: Splash screen PNG assets generated by @capacitor/assets for all Android drawable buckets: mdpi, hdpi, xhdpi, xxhdpi, xxxhdpi, ldpi. Variants cover portrait and landscape orientations (drawable-port-*, drawable-land-*) and night mode (drawable-*-night-*). All variants display the same VocabFlow branding centered on a solid background.

nodes.label: Android Launcher Icons hdpi + splash land-night variants
Android Splash night + ldpi launcher icons
Android ldpi launcher + default splash + xxxhdpi launcher
Android xxhdpi launcher icons + port-ldpi splash
Android splash land variants + xhdpi launcher
Android xhdpi launcher + xxxhdpi night splash
